CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report its Instrument Name and Firmware Version.
Instructs the instrument to aspirate from left, right or both syringes.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Left, Right or Both.
Valve: N, R for 2-Way.
Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.
Valve: N, R for 2-Way.
Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to clear the last error for left and right instrument components.
Instructs the instrument to dispense from left, right or both syringes.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Left, Right or Both.
Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.
Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to stop operation for both syringes. An error will be set.
Instructs the instrument to report the last error for instrument component(s) (e.g. 'Left = 0 No Error:Right = 0 No Error' 'Left = 0 No Error:Right = 31 Invalid Syringe Size').

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Returns error for Left (e.g. 'Left = 0 No Error' 'Left = 31 Invalid Syringe Size').
Returns error for Right (e.g. 'Right = 0 No Error' 'Right = 31 Invalid Syringe Size').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the status of the motor(s) where the status is 'ab' (i.e. 'a' is the valve motor status and 'b' is the syringe motor status (e.g. 'Left = PP:Right = PP' 'Left = RP:Right = PU').

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Returns motor status for Left (e.g. 'Left = PP' 'Left = RP').
Returns motor status for Right (e.g. 'Right = PP' 'Right = PU').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the Serial Number. The serial number is the same for left and right instrument components.
Instructs the instrument to safely stop operation for both syringes.
Instructs the instrument to move valves to 'N' position and to home both syringes.
Instructs the instrument to reset both syringe modules to power up state.
Instructs the instrument to set the Serial Number. The serial number is the same for left and right instrument components.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Serial Number for instrument.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the Left and Right Syringe Size (e.g. 1000 uL for 1 mL syringe).

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Left Syringe size.
Right Syringe size.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: KeepAlive. For system use only.

Instructs the instrument to wait for left syringe and valve, right syringe and valve, or both (left and right). Returns motor status (e.g. 'Left = Success:Right = Success' 'Left = Success:Right = Error: One or more motors unpowered').

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Left, Right or Both.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Returns motor status for Left (e.g. 'Left = Success' 'Left = Error: One or more motors unpowered').
Returns motor status for Right (e.g. 'Right = Success' 'Right = Error: One or more motors unpowered').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report its Instrument Name and Firmware Version.
Instructs the instrument to aspirate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Valve: N or R for 2-Way.
Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to clear the last error.
Instructs the instrument to dispense.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to stop operation. An error will be set.
Instructs the instrument to report the last error.
Instructs the instrument to return particular type. 0 : 4020 Syringe Pump, 1 : 4120 Dual w/Tee Syringe Pump, 2 : 4220 Dual Syringe Pump, 3 : 4060 Syringe Pump, 4 : 4260 Dual Syringe Pump

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: 0 : 4020 Syringe Pump, 1 : 4120 Dual w/Tee Syringe Pump, 2 : 4220 Dual Syringe Pump, 3 : 4060 Syringe Pump, 4 : 4260 Dual Syringe Pump, Invalid parameter index

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the status of the motor(s) where the status is 'ab' (i.e. 'a' is the valve motor status and 'b' is the syringe motor status.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: E for Error, R for Running, U for Unpowered, P for Parked (e.g. 'Status = PP', 'Status = RP').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the integer value of the specified NV Memory Address(Index).

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Address(Index) Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Reports value at NV Memory Address(Index). Possible error is 'Invalid parameter index'. Value is reported as 'Value = at Unit ID = GSIOCID,Address=Value' (e.g. 'Value = at Unit ID = 1,3=5').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to get the Service Date. The service date can be up to 16 characters.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: The service date can be up to 16 characters.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the number of movements for the syringe and valve.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Reports "Unit ID = u : Syringe = n, Valve = n" where u is the Unit ID and n is count of movements.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the valve position (N, R) and syringe volume in uL. Reports '?' if unknown (e.g. Not homed).

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: N or R for 2-Way valve or '?' if unknown.
Syringe volume in uL or '?' if unknown.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Get Syringe Size and Flow Rate Info
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the Syringe size and Flow Rate minimum, maximum and default.
Instructs the instrument to safely stop operation of syringe.
Instructs the instrument to move valve to 'N' position and home syringe.
Instructs the instrument to reset to power up state.
Instructs the instrument to reset NV memory and initialize machine performance parameters to default values. Serial Number and GSIOC ID are not reset.
Instructs the instrument to reset the number of movements for the syringe and/or valve.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Reset info for type Syringe, Valve or Both.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to configure itself as a particular type.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: 0 : 4020 Syringe Pump, 1 : 4120 Dual w/Tee Syringe Pump, 2 : 4220 Dual Syringe Pump, 3 : 4060 Syringe Pump, 4 : 4260 Dual Syringe Pump

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the specified NV memory integer parameters.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Address(Index) Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.
Integer Parameter Value: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the Service Date. The service date can be up to 16 characters.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Service Date for instrument. The service date can be up to 16 characters.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the Syringe Size (e.g. 1000 uL for 1 mL syringe).

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Syringe size for instrument.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to home and run sequential pattern test. Remove syringe before running this test.
Instructs the instrument to stop any test mode in progress.
Instructs the instrument to move to valve position.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Valve: N or R for 2-Way.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to wait for left syringe and valve.
Instructs the instrument to report its Instrument Name and Firmware Version.
Instructs the instrument to aspirate.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Valve: N or R for 2-Way.
Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to clear the last error.
Instructs the instrument to dispense.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Volume: v.vvv is the volume in uL.
Flow Rate: s.sss is the flow rate in mL/min.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to stop operation. An error will be set.
Instructs the instrument to report the last error.
Instructs the instrument to return particular type. 0 : 4020 Syringe Pump, 1 : 4120 Dual w/Tee Syringe Pump, 2 : 4220 Dual Syringe Pump, 3 : 4060 Syringe Pump, 4 : 4260 Dual Syringe Pump

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: 0 : 4020 Syringe Pump, 1 : 4120 Dual w/Tee Syringe Pump, 2 : 4220 Dual Syringe Pump, 3 : 4060 Syringe Pump, 4 : 4260 Dual Syringe Pump, Invalid parameter index

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the status of the motor(s) where the status is 'ab' (i.e. 'a' is the valve motor status and 'b' is the syringe motor status.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: E for Error, R for Running, U for Unpowered, P for Parked (e.g. 'Status = PP', 'Status = RP').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the integer value of the specified NV Memory Address(Index).

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Address(Index) Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Reports value at NV Memory Address(Index). Possible error is 'Invalid parameter index'. Value is reported as 'Value = at Unit ID = GSIOCID,Address=Value' (e.g. 'Value = at Unit ID = 1,3=5').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to get the Service Date. The service date can be up to 16 characters.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: The service date can be up to 16 characters.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the number of movements for the syringe and valve.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Reports "Unit ID = u : Syringe = n, Valve = n" where u is the Unit ID and n is count of movements.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the valve position (N, R) and syringe volume in uL. Reports '?' if unknown (e.g. Not homed).

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: N or R for 2-Way valve or '?' if unknown.
Syringe volume in uL or '?' if unknown.

CommandDefinition.CommandName: Get Syringe Size and Flow Rate Info
CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the Syringe size and Flow Rate minimum, maximum and default.
Instructs the instrument to safely stop operation of syringe.
Instructs the instrument to move valve to 'N' position and home syringe.
Instructs the instrument to reset to power up state.
Instructs the instrument to reset NV memory and initialize machine performance parameters to default values. Serial Number and GSIOC ID are not reset.
Instructs the instrument to reset the number of movements for the syringe and/or valve.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Reset info for type Syringe, Valve or Both.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to configure itself as a particular type.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: 0 : 4020 Syringe Pump, 1 : 4120 Dual w/Tee Syringe Pump, 2 : 4220 Dual Syringe Pump, 3 : 4060 Syringe Pump, 4 : 4260 Dual Syringe Pump

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the specified NV memory integer parameters.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Address(Index) Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.
Integer Parameter Value: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the Service Date. The service date can be up to 16 characters.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Service Date for instrument. The service date can be up to 16 characters.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the Syringe Size (e.g. 1000 uL for 1 mL syringe).

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Syringe size for instrument.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to home and run sequential pattern test. Remove syringe before running this test.
Instructs the instrument to stop any test mode in progress.
Instructs the instrument to move to valve position.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Valve: N or R for 2-Way.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to wait for right syringe and valve.
Instructs the instrument to send the Instruction Set.
Instructs the instrument to report the last response from a '.' command. For system use only.

Instructs the instrument to report the integer value of the specified NV Memory Address(Index). For Dual Syringe Pumps the System Device command is concerned with the Left Syringe only. To address the Left or Right Syringe specifically use the devices for Left and Right Syringe.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Address(Index) Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Reports value at NV Memory Address(Index). Possible error is 'Invalid parameter index'. Value is reported as 'Value = at Unit ID = GSIOCID,Address=Value' (e.g. 'Value = at Unit ID = 1,3=5').

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the value of the current NV memory location. For Dual Syringe Pumps the System Device command is concerned with the Left Syringe only. To address the Left or Right Syringe specifically use the devices for Left and Right Syringe. For system use only.

Instructs the instrument to move to the specified NV memory index. For Dual Syringe Pumps the System Device command is concerned with the Left Syringe only. To address the Left or Right Syringe specifically use the devices for Left and Right Syringe.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Index Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to report the Serial Number. For system use only.
Instructs the instrument to report the Service Date. For system use only.

Instructs the instrument to report the number of movements for the syringe and valve. Each command execution yields either syringe or valve info, so you need to execute twice for both. For system use only.

ReturnParameter.ParameterNotes: Reports "Status = Syringe = n" or "Status = Valve = n" where n is count of movements.

CommandDefinition.CommandNotes: Instructs the instrument to set the specified NV memory integer parameters. For Dual Syringe Pumps the System Device command is concerned with the Left Syringe only. To address the Left or Right Syringe specifically use the devices for Left and Right Syringe.

Parameter.ParameterNotes: Parameter Address(Index) Values: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.
Integer Parameter Value: Vary depending on product-specific memory map definitions.
